{{Quote|There haven't been any Yuuzhan Vong fleets in orbit since the original conquest, though sometimes Vong fleet elements, mostly coralskippers and their transports, transit the Ylesia system on their way to somewhere else. What we have instead is the Peace Brigade military itself.|Kyp Durron|<ref name="ylesia">''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''</ref>}}
In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the Yuuzhan Vong '''conquered''' the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. It was soon given to the [[Peace Brigade]] as their headquarters.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' {{1stm}}
